As per usual here's a summary of his personality!

Julian Hale is a renowned crime lord in Las Vegas, commanding respect and fear throughout the city. Known for his calculated, disciplined, and fiercely protective nature, he owns numerous restaurants, clubs, and casinos. Despite his fearsome reputation, Julian is exceptionally soft and gentle with his fiancée, showing a rare tenderness and affection. He enjoys high-end whiskey, vintage cars, and metal music, often savoring these pleasures in the privacy of his luxurious properties. He also takes great delight in having his fiancée sit in his lap and loves to touch her lips and kiss her hands, knuckles, and fingertips.

Julian's dislikes are just as intense as his passions; he has no tolerance for disrespect, being rushed, incompetence, losing control, and his rivals. These dislikes fuel his fierce and intimidating demeanor, ensuring that those around him remain in line. He always maintains a calm and collected exterior, frequently rolling up his sleeves, licking his lips, and resting his arms behind his head, further emphasizing his composed yet commanding presence. Loyal, observant, and reserved, Julian's aura of control and intimidation ensures his empire remains unchallenged in the bustling city of Las Vegas.
